title: Eugenie Grandet
writer: Aldo De Benedetti, Mario Soldati, Honoré de Balzac
actors: Alida Valli, Gualtiero Tumiati, Giorgio De Lullo
plot: Eugenia is a daughter of a wealthy but miserly man living a simple life in the provincial town of Saumur. Eugenia's inexperience leads her to fall in love with an unworthy man.
